questions.question: James says faith without works is what?
James criticizes believers for showing favoritism to whom?
questions.feedback: James rebukes giving the rich preferential treatment while dishonoring the poor.

questions.question: James says that even the demons believe in one God.
questions.feedback: Even the demons believe — and shudder.

questions.question: Abraham was considered righteous for what he did when he offered his son _____ on the altar.
questions.feedback: Abraham was justified by works when he offered Isaac on the altar.

questions.question: James says to love your _____ as yourself — this is the royal law.
questions.feedback: Love your neighbor as yourself — the royal law found in Scripture.
